critical_rules.index_html: NEVER use the Edit tool on index.html — it truncates the file. Always use Python scripts (read full file, str.replace, write back). After every write, verify '</html>' exists at end of file.
critical_rules.sw_js: NEVER use Edit tool on sw.js. Use bash: sed -i 's/po-manager-vN/po-manager-vM/' sw.js
critical_rules.sw_bump: Bump SW cache version on EVERY push that changes JS or CSS.
critical_rules.gas_v8_no_nested_functions: Never write 'function foo(){}' inside an if/for/function block in GAS. Use 'var foo = function(){}' instead.
critical_rules.gas_ascii_only: No em dashes (—), curly quotes, or Unicode punctuation in GAS string literals. ASCII only.
critical_rules.gas_brace_balance: After any GAS edit, verify open/close brace counts match: python3 -c "t=open('PO_Manager_Code.gs').read(); print(t.count('{'), t.count('}'))"
critical_rules.gas_cors: gasCall() fetch must have NO Content-Type header. GAS rejects OPTIONS preflight. Body is plain JSON string, no headers.
critical_rules.gas_redeploy: GAS changes only go live after manual redeploy: Deploy > Manage Deployments > pencil > New version > Deploy.
critical_rules.powershell_git: PowerShell does not support &&. Use separate lines: git add, git commit, git push.
critical_rules.git_index_lock: If git complains about index.lock: find /path/.git -name 'index.lock' -exec rm {} \; then retry.
critical_rules.node_check: Always run node --check on extracted JS before pushing.
critical_rules.tab_css: Tab divs must NOT have inline display:none — the .tab CSS class handles hiding. Inline style overrides .tab.active { display: block }.
critical_rules.truncation_check: After any file write to index.html, check: python3 -c "h=open('index.html').read(); print(h.count('</html>'), h[-50:])"

stack.frontend: Single-file PWA — vanilla JS + inline CSS in index.html
stack.backend: Google Apps Script web app, REST-style doPost() routing
stack.auth: Email + password verified against HR Google Sheet
stack.data: Google Sheets (PO Database, HR, Time Tracking)

HR.columns: A=Name, B=Email, C=Phone, D=Role, E=Password, F=Allotted PTO, G=Used PTO, H=Remaining PTO

Time_Tracking.columns: A=Name, B=Email, C=Date, D=ClockIn, E=ClockOut, F=Hours

tabs.dashboard: PO stats, New PO button (admin/office only), recent POs
tabs.receive (tab-create): Log a received PO with photos
tabs.account (tab-account): Profile edit, time clock, PTO summary

tab_and_panel_system.panel_system_note: ALL_PANELS array must be kept in sync in both showOtherHome() and showOtherPanel() forEach loops. Missing panel = panel leaks visible on wrong page.

key_functions.gasCall: fetch(GAS_URL, { method:'POST', redirect:'follow', body: JSON.stringify({action, ...payload}) }) — NO Content-Type header
key_functions.getPeriodBounds: Semi-monthly pay periods. day<=15 → 1st–15th. day>15 → 16th–last day of month.
key_functions.applyRole: Called after login. Calls hideSplash(), sets G.perms, shows/hides elements via sd(id, bool), calls showTabDirect.
key_functions.showOtherPanel: Hides all panels via ALL_PANELS forEach, shows target panel, calls load function.
key_functions.loadAccount: Calls getClockStatus + getTimesheet + getPTOData. PTO fields: d.balance.allotted (NOT d.allotted), d.myRequests (NOT d.history), r.dates (NOT r.startDate), status keys lowercase.
key_functions.hideSplash: Called by applyRole, showLoginScreen, loadData. 8s safety net timeout also calls it.
key_functions.initPhotoSlots: Renders 5 photo slots. Pre-existing slots show Drive thumbnails via driveThumbUrl().

global_state.G_object: G = { pos, config, filter, role, userEmail, perms, pricing, contacts, ... }
global_state.G_name: G.config.userName — employee display name from HR col A
global_state.G_role: G.role — set from config.userRole on login

localStorage.panoramic_ops_config: Cached config object (userRole, statusOptions, vendorOptions, userName, userPhone, userEmail)
localStorage.panoramic_ops_pos_cache: Cached PO list for instant dashboard load

asana.pat_location: GAS Script Properties only — never frontend or chat
asana.note: All Asana calls go through GAS backend. Frontend never calls Asana directly.

features_built: PO management (create, receive, edit, search, filter)
Photo upload to Google Drive (up to 5 per PO)
PTO requests (submit, approve, deny via Asana)
Time Clock (clock in/out, hours this period)
Account tab (profile edit, time clock widget, PTO summary)
PTO Overview (admin: balance bars + pending queue)
Payroll Summary (admin: hours per employee, email summary)
features_planned: Office Notes tab (notes sheet + optional Asana subtask with per-note flag)
Announcements (admin posts once-per-version message, localStorage dismissal)
known_bugs_fixed: index.html truncation: Edit tool truncates large files — always use Python scripts
Tab not showing: inline style display:none overrides .tab.active CSS class
Panel leaking: panel name missing from ALL_PANELS forEach list
Employee name showing as email: getRoleByEmail() wasn't returning name field
PTO balance showing --: field path was d.allotted, should be d.balance.allotted
getTimesheet truncated: file ended mid-function, restored with semi-monthly logic
App stuck on splash: index.html truncated mid-function, missing </script></body></html>
Photo upload stuck on Loading: iOS suspends JS when app backgrounds mid-upload — added 45s/90s timeouts
HEIC photos stuck: no img.onerror handler — canvas decode fails silently for HEIC format
git index.lock: lock file on Windows machine, use find -exec rm to delete from Linux sandbox
Payroll showing email: Time Tracking name col had email stored — fixed to cross-ref HR sheet
PowerShell &&: not supported, use separate lines
skills_installed: panoramic-app-builder (primary dev skill — read before any app work)
material-report (fills Excel cost report from Drive invoices)
po-received (fills Google Form for PO logging)
morning-assistant (daily planning with Google Calendar + Tasks)
deployment_workflow: 1. Edit GAS: verify brace balance, no nested functions, ASCII only
2. Redeploy GAS: Deploy > Manage Deployments > New version
6. Git push: separate lines (add, commit, push)
7. Hard refresh app: pull-to-refresh on mobile or Ctrl+Shift+R
